docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RACZKOWSKI, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT CECCHINI, JEANNINE DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CECCHINI, JEANNINE DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF NINA RACZKOWSKI & DEFENDANT JEANNINE CECCHINI, DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES. MONIKA RILEY, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. DALE NEWBERRY, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT RETAINED EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,165.00 FILED BY RACZKOWSKI, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT CECCHINI, JEANNINE DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY RACZKOWSKI, NINA CECCHINI, JEANNINE DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CECCHINI, JEANNINE DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RACZKOWSKI, NINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CECCHINI, JEANNINE DBA SUGAR PINE DOODLES CONTRACT SPECIFICALLY CALLS FOR ANY CLAIMS TO BE FILED IN AMADOR COUNTY. ANY CLAIM SHOULD BE FILED THERE. CONTRACT ALSO PROHIBITS REFUNDS, ALLOWING ONLY EXCHANGE OF ONE PET FOR ANOTHER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
